bpf_smc.bpf.o.reason: libbpf cannot find bpf_struct_ops_smc_hs_ctrl or the smc_release/smc_switch_to_fallback fentry targets in the current UML kernel BTF; the selftest only runs after SMC setup succeeds

struct_ops_module.bpf.o.reason: raw object contains intentionally incompatible testmod_zeroed struct_ops state; the selftest harness disables/mutates struct_ops maps and program autoload before loading

tcp_ca_kfunc.bpf.o.reason: object calls TCP congestion-control kfuncs, for example bbr_cwnd_event_tx_start, that are absent from the current UML kernel or module BTF

test_map_in_map.bpf.o.reason: libbpf fails to create mim_array because the legacy map-in-map object relies on the harness calling bpf_map__set_inner_map_fd() before load

test_select_reuseport_kern.bpf.o.reason: libbpf fails to create outer_map because the selftest harness creates the reuseport array and calls bpf_map__reuse_fd() before load

test_wakeup_source.bpf.o.reason: libbpf cannot resolve bpf_wakeup_sources_get_head from the current UML kernel BTF; the selftest skips when that kfunc is unavailable

xfrm_info.bpf.o.reason: current bpf-next object can require backend support or setup beyond the current UML verification stack

test_sk_assign.bpf.o.reason: libbpf v1 refuses the legacy SEC("maps") iproute2 object; test_sk_assign_libbpf.bpf.o is the standalone libbpf variant

tracing_multi_session_attach.bpf.o.reason: new upstream fsession.multi section type; libbpf cannot resolve the fsession attach type without fprobe/ftrace support, which UML lacks

test_usdt_multispec.bpf.o.reason: USDT spec resolution requires uprobe support, which UML lacks; newly in-corpus since the __UML_PT_REGS__ layout fix let the object compile
